0.2065*(0.1173*exp(0.8887*x_1) + 0.0752*sinh(1.4167 - 1.9065*x_2) - 1)**2 + 0.0203*(0.0965*sin(5.6641*x_1 - 9.259) - 0.6136*sin(3.3405*x_2 + 7.0567) + 1)**2 - 0.759*exp(0.1525*(1 - 0.9265*x_2)**3 - 1.5876*sin(0.4952*x_1 - 4.8211)) + 0.088*sin(-0.2632*sin(2.4723*x_1 - 5.4775) + 8.5701 + 5.5356*exp(-0.3673*x_2)) - 0.0068*sinh(-2.1612*sin(0.5481*x_1 + 4.9897) - 6.4003*tanh(0.598*x_2 - 1.3899) - 5.5659) - 0.4037

-0.3566*(-0.0828*(1 - 0.9265*x_2)**3 + 0.8623*sin(0.4952*x_1 - 4.8211) - 1)**2 - 0.004*(exp(0.8887*x_1) + 0.6406*sinh(1.4167 - 1.9065*x_2) + 0.6013)**2 + 0.1091*exp(-0.0559*sin(5.6641*x_1 - 9.259) + 0.3552*sin(3.3405*x_2 + 7.0567)) + 0.0573*sin(-0.2529*sin(2.4723*x_1 - 5.4775) + 6.3189 + 5.3208*exp(-0.3673*x_2)) - 0.3782*sinh(-0.5238*sin(0.5481*x_1 + 4.9897) - 1.5511*tanh(0.598*x_2 - 1.3899) - 1.8038) + 1.143
